Hello {{1}},

We have a personal loan offer for you.

Loan Details:
• Amount: Up to {{2}}
• Interest Rate: {{3}}% per annum
• Tenure: {{4}} years
• Processing Fee: {{5}}

Disbursement:
• Amount credited to: {{6}}
• Processing time: {{7}} working days

Documents Required:
• Salary slip (3 months)
• Bank statement (3 months)
• PAN Card
• Aadhaar Card
• Address Proof

This is a promotional message. Approval subject to verification.

Reply INTERESTED to proceed.
Reply STOP to opt-out.
T&C apply. Approval subject to verification.
